object.name: ManagedBotUpdated
object.description: This object contains information about the creation or token update of a bot that is managed by the current bot.
object.html_description: This object contains information about the creation or token update of a bot that is managed by the current bot.
object.rst_description: This object contains information about the creation or token update of a bot that is managed by the current bot.

annotations.description: Information about the bot. Token of the bot can be fetched using the method getManagedBotToken.
annotations.html_description: Information about the bot. Token of the bot can be fetched using the method getManagedBotToken.
annotations.rst_description: Information about the bot. Token of the bot can be fetched using the method :class:`aiogram.methods.get_managed_bot_token.GetManagedBotToken`.
annotations.name: bot
